title: International travel and migration data package | Stats NZ
content:
## International travel and migration data package
27 February 2018, 10:45am
Download the international travel and migration data package. The data covers the period from 1999 to 2016 and includes the number of overseas visitors, New Zealand resident travellers, and permanent and long-term migrants (PLT) entering or leaving New Zealand. Note the PLT series is intention based and is no longer New Zealand’s official migrant series.
International travel and migration module 1999–2016 (Excel, 8 sheets, 614 KB)
The following tables are available:
- permanent and long term arrivals and departures by country of last/next permanent residence and by country of residence
- permanent and long term arrivals and departures by occupation and age group
- permanent and long term arrivals and departures by sex and country of last/next permanent residence (major group) and by age group
- overseas visitor arrivals by country of last/next permanent residence (major group) and intended length of stay and by purpose of visit
- New Zealand resident departures, country of main destination (major group) and intended length of stay and by purpose of visit
- New Zealand and overseas port of embarkation/disembarkation and by direction of travel and passenger type.

## About the current official migrant series
The official migrant series is now outcome based, becoming final after 16 months, when travel in and out of the country has allowed migrant status to be determined. See International travel – DataInfo+ .
- Statistics for university staff and students 13 January 2021
